markets.rules_secondary:
The following market refers to the Chiesa vs Price professional MMA fight originally scheduled for Mar 28, 2026. If this fight is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled fight has finished (within two weeks). If the fight is declared a tie or no contest, the market will resolve to 50/50 for both fighters. If the fight is cancelled or rescheduled to over two weeks away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.

This market and these products have not been endorsed by Zuffa LLC, d/b/a Ultimate Fighting Championship, UFC. Any references to the “UFC,” or any other associated marks are descriptive only, and do not indicate an endorsement of this product or any affiliation between Zuffa and Kalshi.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Before 2027
markets.rules_primary: If the FDA announces Reclassification of BPC-157 to Category 1 of the Bulk Drug Substances List before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The Payout Criterion is satisfied by placement of BPC-157 in either Category 1 or Category 1 Bulk Drug Substances Under Evaluation on the 503A Bulk Drug Substances list, as either designation restores compounding eligibility. 
Removal from Category 2 alone, without placement in Category 1, does not satisfy the Payout Criterion.
markets.title: When will FDA announce Reclassification of BPC-157 to Category 1 of the Bulk Drug Substances List?

markets.no_sub_title: At least 95,000 albums
markets.rules_primary: If Whatever's Clever! by Charlie Puth's sales, on the Hits Daily Double Top 50 Chart dated April 2, 2026, are at least 95000, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This event will specifically encompass the number listed under the Albums column on the Hits Daily Double’s Top 50 chart for the relevant week. If data is unavailable or partially unavailable by the Expiration date, then all affected markets resolve to No. Hits Daily Double recently adjusted the release timing of its weekly Top 50 Album Chart, publishing the chart with a Thursday date instead of the previously-used Friday date. Given the changed schedule of release from Friday to Thursday, Kalshi will resolve future markets using the chart dated Thursday as the Contract Underlying, pursuant to Rule 7.2(a). Note: this event is directional.
markets.title: Will Whatever's Clever! have at least 95000 pure album sales on the Hits Daily Double Top 50 Chart for April 2, 2026?
markets.yes_sub_title: At least 95,000 albums
